AxReportDesign.Name: Report
AxReportDesign.Text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <Report xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/sqlserver/reporting/2016/01/reportdefinition" xmlns:rd="http://schemas.microsoft.com/SQLServer/reporting/reportdesigner"> <AutoRefresh>0</AutoRefresh> <DataSources> <DataSource Name="AutoGen__ReportDataProvider"> <Transaction>true</Transaction> <ConnectionProperties> <DataProvider>AXREPORTDATAPROVIDER</DataProvider> <ConnectString /> <IntegratedSecurity>true</IntegratedSecurity> </ConnectionProperties> <rd:DataSourceID>3c88c35d-24e5-4161-b786-e174316706e6</rd:DataSourceID> </DataSource> </DataSources> <DataSets> <DataSet Name="ETGVolumeFromCustomers"> <Query> <DataSourceName>AutoGen__ReportDataProvider</DataSourceName> <QueryParameters> <QueryParameter Name="AX_PartitionKey"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_PartitionKey.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_CompanyName"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_CompanyName.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_UserContext"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_UserContext.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_RenderingCulture"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_RenderingCulture.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_ReportContext"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_ReportContext.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_RdpPreProcessedId"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_RdpPreProcessedId.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="FromDate"> <Value>=Parameters!ETGVolumeFromCustomers_FromDate.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="ToDate"> <Value>=Parameters!ETGVolumeFromCustomers_ToDate.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="parmCustAccount"> <Value>=Parameters!parmCustAccount.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="parmInvoiceId"> <Value>=Parameters!ETGVolumeFromCustomers_parmInvoiceId.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="Deposit"> <Value>=Parameters!ETGVolumeFromCustomers_Deposit.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="parmSize"> <Value>=Parameters!ETGVolumeFromCustomers_parmSize.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> </QueryParameters> <CommandText>SELECT * FROM ETGVolumeFromCustomersDP.ETGVolumeFromCustomersTmp</CommandText> <rd:UseGenericDesigner>true</rd:UseGenericDesigner> </Query> <Fields> <Field Name="CustAccount"> <DataField>ETGVolumeFromCustomersTmp.1.CustAccount</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="CustName"> <DataField>ETGVolumeFromCustomersTmp.1.CustName</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGBusinessSegmentLabel"> <DataField>ETGVolumeFromCustomersTmp.1.ETGBusinessSegment:LABEL(ETGBusinessSegment)</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGBusinessSegmentName"> <DataField>ETGVolumeFromCustomersTmp.1.ETGBusinessSegment:NAME(ETGBusinessSegment)</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGConnectionTypeLabel"> <DataField>ETGVolumeFromCustomersTmp.1.ETGConnectionType:LABEL(ETGConnectionType)</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGConnectionTypeName"> <DataField>ETGVolumeFromCustomersTmp.1.ETGConnectionType:NAME(ETGConnectionType)</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGDepositLabel"> <DataField>ETGVolumeFromCustomersTmp.1.ETGDeposit:LABEL(NoYes)</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGDepositName"> <DataField>ETGVolumeFromCustomersTmp.1.ETGDeposit:NAME(NoYes)</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGPackSize"> <DataField>ETGVolumeFromCustomersTmp.1.ETGPackSize</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGPrimaryUnit"> <DataField>ETGVolumeFromCustomersTmp.1.ETGPrimaryUnit</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGQtyInPrimaryUnit"> <DataField>ETGVolumeFromCustomersTmp.1.ETGQtyInPrimaryUnit</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGQtyInSecondaryUnit"> <DataField>ETGVolumeFromCustomersTmp.1.ETGQtyInSecondaryUnit</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGSecondaryUnit"> <DataField>ETGVolumeFromCustomersTmp.1.ETGSecondaryUnit</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGValueInLocalCurrency"> <DataField>ETGVolumeFromCustomersTmp.1.ETGValueInLocalCurrency</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGValueInUSD"> <DataField>ETGVolumeFromCustomersTmp.1.ETGValueInUSD</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="InvoiceDate"> <DataField>ETGVolumeFromCustomersTmp.1.InvoiceDate</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.DateTime</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ItemId"> <DataField>ETGVolumeFromCustomersTmp.1.ItemId</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ItemName"> <DataField>ETGVolumeFromCustomersTmp.1.ItemName</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="SalesId"> <DataField>ETGVolumeFromCustomersTmp.1.SalesId</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> </Fields> <rd:DataSetInfo> <rd:DataSetName>ETGVolumeFromCustomers</rd:DataSetName> <rd:TableName>Fields</rd:TableName> <rd:TableAdapterFillMethod>Fill</rd:TableAdapterFillMethod> <rd:TableAdapterGetDataMethod>GetData</rd:TableAdapterGetDataMethod> <rd:TableAdapterName>FieldsTableAdapter</rd:TableAdapterName> </rd:DataSetInfo> </DataSet> </DataSets> <ReportSections> <ReportSection> <Body> <ReportItems> <Tablix Name="Tablix1"> <TablixBody> <TablixColumns> <TablixColumn> <Width>0.5625in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1.11111in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1.11806in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>0.85417in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>0.56944in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>0.48611in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>0.68056in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>0.75in</Width> </TablixColumn> </TablixColumns> <TablixRows> <TablixRow> <Height>0.25in</Height> <TablixCells> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox19"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Labels!@ETG_New:Date</Value> <Style> <FontFamily>Segoe UI</FontFamily> <FontSize>8pt</FontSize> <FontWeight>Bold</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Left</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox19</rd:DefaultName> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox29"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Labels!@ETG_New:Salesordernumber</Value> <Style> <FontFamily>Segoe UI</FontFamily> <FontSize>8pt</FontSize> <FontWeight>Bold</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Left</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox17"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Labels!@ETG_New:CustId</Value> <Style> <FontFamily>Segoe UI</FontFamily> <FontSize>8pt</FontSize> <FontWeight>Bold</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Left</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox17</rd:DefaultName> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox15"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <TextAlign>Left</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox15</rd:DefaultName> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <Name>AXEDTFormat</Name> <Value>ETGVolumeFromCustomersTmp.ETGBusinessSegment</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTTextAlign</Name>
